content:
Sure, here is the JSON file extracting for each of the locations in the following caption the name (name), the full address (full_address), and the order (order) in which it was found in the text:


The caption mentions 10 locations in total. The first 9 locations are all in the province of Lecce, in the southern part of Puglia. The last location, Torre Ovo, is located in the province of Brindisi, in the central part of Puglia.

The order of the locations in the caption is as follows:

1. Castro Marina
2. Torre Castiglione
3. Porto Cesareo
4. Porto Cesareo
5. Cisternino
6. Porto Cesareo
7. Torre dell'Orso
8. Sant'Isidoro
9. Porto Cesareo
10. Torre Ovo
